name: DataForSEO
one_liner: SEO, SERP, keyword and backlink data API provider.
auth_note: HTTP Basic auth; auto-generated API login:password Base64-encoded in Authorization header (not the account password). Confirmed on docs.dataforseo.com/v3/auth.
access_note: Open self-serve signup, prepaid/pay-as-you-go credits, low entry cost; no approval needed.
mcp_note: DataForSEO publishes an official MCP server (dataforseo-mcp-server); also surfaced via Composio DataForSEO MCP.
main_blocker: None; self-serve Basic-auth REST API with free credits.

name: SE Ranking
one_liner: SEO platform: keyword, rank, backlink and audit data API.
auth_note: Single API key created in dashboard, passed as 'Token YOUR_API_KEY' Authorization header (or token param) across Data API and Project API. Confirmed on docs.
access_note: Requires a paid SE Ranking subscription; API consumes account/API credits. Obtainable but not free.
mcp_note: Official hosted MCP server at api.seranking.com/mcp with 160+ tools, built/managed by SE Ranking. Confirmed on docs.
main_blocker: Paid subscription and API credits required to obtain a working key.

name: Ahrefs
one_liner: SEO toolset: Site Explorer, keywords, backlinks, rank data API.
auth_note: API v3 uses an API key/token. Free limited test queries on all plans; full programmatic use tied to plan API units.
access_note: API v3 requires a paid plan (Lite+ for units; Enterprise ~$1,499/mo for full access and pay-as-you-go overages). Costly but obtainable.
mcp_note: Official hosted MCP at api.ahrefs.com/mcp (Lite plan or higher); GitHub local server is deprecated. Confirmed via docs/github.
main_blocker: Paid plan gate; meaningful volume needs expensive Advanced/Enterprise tiers.

name: MrScraper
one_liner: AI web scraping API with proxies and headless browsers.
auth_note: Scraper API uses an API token passed in the x-api-token header. Confirmed on docs.mrscraper.com activating-api page.
access_note: Self-serve dashboard signup generates the API token; specific free-trial terms not confirmed from docs.
mcp_note: No official or community MCP server found for MrScraper.
main_blocker: None material; self-serve token-based REST API, though smaller/less-proven vendor.

name: Apify
one_liner: Actor marketplace platform for web scraping and automation.
auth_note: API token via Bearer Authorization header (or query param); public Actors callable without auth. Confirmed on docs.apify.com/api/v2.
access_note: Open self-serve signup with a free tier of platform credits; thousands of ready-made Actors.
mcp_note: Official Apify MCP server at mcp.apify.com (apify/actors-mcp-server) exposing Store Actors as tools. Verified.
main_blocker: None; self-serve REST API with free tier and rich SDK/MCP.

name: Firecrawl
one_liner: LLM-focused API to scrape, crawl, map and extract web content.
auth_note: REST uses Bearer API key (fc-...); MCP endpoint additionally supports OAuth2 for keyless client sign-in. Confirmed on docs.firecrawl.dev.
access_note: Self-serve signup with free tier; tiered subscription for higher rate/concurrency limits.
mcp_note: Official Firecrawl MCP server (firecrawl-mcp-server; mcp.firecrawl.dev) with OAuth support. Verified.
main_blocker: None; self-serve Bearer-key REST API plus official MCP.

name: Bright Data
one_liner: Web data platform: proxies, Web Unlocker, SERP and scrapers.
auth_note: API access via hashed API key/token (permission levels); native proxy access via account ID + proxy user/password (Basic). Confirmed on docs.brightdata.com.
access_note: Self-serve signup with default API key auto-created, but scraping products involve KYC/compliance review before some zones activate.
mcp_note: Bright Data ships an official MCP server for its Web Unlocker/SERP/scraper APIs.
main_blocker: KYC/compliance approval for some scraping zones; usage-based cost.

name: Sherlock
one_liner: Open-source CLI to hunt usernames across 400+ social networks.
auth_note: Local open-source CLI tool; no hosted API and no auth. It fetches public profile URLs directly and needs no API keys.
access_note: Free open-source (MIT); install via pipx/pip/Docker. Not a SaaS API - runs locally.
mcp_note: No official/community MCP; it is a standalone Python CLI (single-purpose OSINT lookup).
main_blocker: None as a wrapped callable skill/CLI; no hosted API exists to call remotely.

name: Waterfall.io
one_liner: B2B contact and company data waterfall enrichment API.
auth_note: API key passed in x-api-key header to api.waterfall.io; ~13 endpoints for contact/company enrichment, prospecting, verification. Confirmed on docs.waterfall.io.
access_note: Public docs exist, but B2B data product requires a paid account/credits; self-serve vs sales-onboarding not confirmed from docs.
mcp_note: No official or community MCP server found.
main_blocker: Paid B2B-data credentials required; obscure vendor, onboarding path unclear.

name: Clay
one_liner: GTM data enrichment and automation platform, no standalone public API.
auth_note: No traditional public REST API to call Clay from outside. Integration is via in-platform HTTP API blocks and inbound webhooks; a limited Enterprise API exists for people/company lookups (key-based).
access_note: No self-serve external API; programmatic use is webhook ingestion or an Enterprise-gated lookup API. Confirmed by Clay's own docs.
mcp_note: No official Clay MCP server confirmed.
main_blocker: No public retrieval API; external access limited to webhooks or Enterprise-gated lookup API.
